mapper.select: SELECT * FROM person_project_handovers WHERE person_id = #{personId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, handover_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person_project_handovers ( person_id, project_id, handover_to_user_id, handover_to_name, handover_status, handover_remark, handover_at ) VALUES ( #{personId}, #{projectId}, #{handoverToUserId}, #{handoverToName}, #{handoverStatus}, #{handoverRemark}, COALESCE(#{handoverAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE handover_to_user_id = VALUES(handover_to_user_id), handover_to_name = VALUES(handover_to_name), handover_status = VALUES(handover_status), handover_remark = VALUES(handover_remark), handover_at = VALUES(handover_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
